verdict: GAUGE STRUCTURE CONFIRMED: H1 gauge invariance exact (|BG|=0e+00, |M*gauge|=2e-14); of L=2105 link d.o.f., 223 are pure gauge (11%, = #nodes-#comp), 698 harmonic/topological, and 1184 are physical (transverse) propagating modes. The link sector carries the genuine gauge redundancy a photon needs -- exactly the structure the orientation Goldstone sector (E4) LACKED (there the 2 modes were internal scalars with NO gauge redundancy). H2 (relativistic dispersion omega=ck of the physical modes) needs the Lorentzian electric/magnetic construction and remains the open hard part.
